title: Tuk Prevoz
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Tuk_prevoz.jpg|thumb|''Tuk Prevoz'' heading to Coruscant]]
The '''''Tuk Prevoz''''' was a modified [[Spacetug/Legends|tug]] owned by the [[Independent Ship Owners]] registered on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], but under contract to [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]], it towed several linked cargo cylinders (each as big as a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] and containing braking rockets), with total cargo around 800/900 megatons, in to Coruscant.

On their way to the planet to rescue [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] from the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] secretly hitched a ride on the underside of one of its cargo cylinders, to evade [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] pickets.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1st|in book}}
*[[Shadows of the Empire 6|''Shadows of the Empire'' 6]]
